_comment: Player decker based on Matrix3 'Decker' contact stats (p.127). Renraku Kraftwerk-8 cyberdeck. Hacking Pool 8 (floor((7+8)/3)=5 base, +1 Encephalon-1, +2 Math SPU-2).
name: Riya Mehta

attributes._note_react: Reaction (Q+I)/2 = (5+7)/2 = 6, +1 from Response Increase deck option = 6 base meat

deck.name: Renraku Kraftwerk-8
deck._note_deck: MPCP 8. Legal limit is 4 in most locales — this is street-grade hot hardware.
deck._note_persona: MPCP rating. No persona attribute may exceed this. Sum of all four ≤ MPCP×3 = 24.
deck._note_attributes: Sum = 24 = MPCP×3. All ≤ 8. Evasion is the combat priority; Masking drives Detection Factor.
deck._note_hardening: Reduces damage from IC attacks (Hardening dice added to damage resistance).
deck._note_memory: 300 Mp active. Total loaded program size must not exceed this.
deck._note_io: 300 Mp/s transfer rate for Download/Upload operations.
deck._note_ri: Response Increase 3 = +3D6 Matrix initiative dice. Also +1 bonus action per RI rating per SR3.

_note_hp: floor((INT 7 + MPCP 8) / 3) = 5 base, +1 Encephalon-1, +2 Math SPU-2 = 8 total.
_note_cs: Computer 5 (Decking 7). Specialization used for all Matrix system operations.
_note_verified: No SRCharacter.json checksum — loaded manually for testing.

_comment_loaded.name: Deception
_comment_loaded._note: Reduces TN for Logon to Host/LTG/RTG, Graceful Logoff, Null Operation.

_comment_loaded.name: Browse
_comment_loaded._note: Reduces TN for Locate File, Locate Access Node, Locate Slave (all interrogation ops).

_comment_loaded.name: Analyze
_comment_loaded._note: Reduces TN for all Analyze ops and Locate IC.

_comment_loaded.name: Read/Write
_comment_loaded._note: Reduces TN for Download Data, Upload Data, Edit File.

_comment_loaded.name: Decrypt
_comment_loaded._note: Reduces TN for Decrypt Access, Decrypt File, Decrypt Slave.

_comment_loaded.name: Sleaze
_comment_loaded._note: Baked into Detection Factor: DF = ceil((Masking + Sleaze) / 2). Higher = harder to detect. With Masking 5 and Sleaze 6: DF = ceil(11/2) = 6.

_comment_unloaded.name: Attack
_comment_unloaded._note: Offensive cybercombat. Swap in when IC combat is expected. Must unload 30 Mp first.

_comment_unloaded.name: Spoof
_comment_unloaded._note: Reduces TN for Control Slave, Edit Slave, Monitor Slave.

_comment_unloaded.name: Evaluate
_comment_unloaded._note: Required for Locate Paydata. Degrades by 1D6÷2 rating after each run (Matrix3 rule).

_comment_unloaded.name: Scanner
_comment_unloaded._note: Reduces TN for Locate Decker. Useful when a security decker is suspected.

_comment_unloaded.name: Commlink
_comment_unloaded._note: Reduces TN for Make Comcall and Tap Comcall.

_comment_unloaded.name: Encrypt
_comment_unloaded._note: Raises TN for others to Decrypt your files. Rated encryption resists Decrypt ops.
